tense_aspect_mood.name: IPFV
tense_aspect_mood.function: imperfective aspect (ongoing or internal view of event)

voice_valence.name: PASS
voice_valence.function: passive voice (demotes agent, promotes non-agent argument to subject role)

voice_valence.name: CAUS
voice_valence.function: causative (adds a higher agent/causer argument: ‘make/let X do Y’)

derivational.name: AGENT_N
derivational.function: agentive (one who habitually or characteristically does X)

derivational.name: ACT_N
derivational.function: event noun (the action or occurrence of doing X)

derivational.name: RES_N
derivational.function: result noun (the result or product created by doing X)

derivational.name: LOC_N
derivational.function: locative noun (place associated with doing X)

derivational.name: REL_ADJ
derivational.function: relational adjective (pertaining or related to the noun X)

number.name: COLL
number.function: collective plural (group treated as a unit)

tense_aspect_mood.name: IPFV
tense_aspect_mood.function: imperfective aspect (ongoing, habitual, or repeated action; unmarked form covers perfective or generic events)

tense_aspect_mood.name: MOD
tense_aspect_mood.function: modal irrealis (hypothetical, desired, planned, or directive situations including commands)

tense_aspect_mood.name: NEG
tense_aspect_mood.function: verbal negation (marks the clause as negative)

voice_valence.name: APPL
voice_valence.function: applicative (adds a beneficiary, goal, or other non-core argument to the verb)

derivational.name: AGENT_N
derivational.function: agentive (one who habitually or characteristically does X)

derivational.name: ACT_N
derivational.function: event or action noun (the act or process of doing X)

derivational.name: REL_ADJ
derivational.function: relational adjective (pertaining or related to the noun)

derivational.name: INST_N
derivational.function: instrument noun (thing used to do X)

derivational.name: ABSTR_N
derivational.function: abstract noun (the quality or state of being X)
